RunSynchronousCommand.Path: reg add "HKLM\SYSTEM\Setup\LabConfig" /v BypassTPMCheck /t REG_DWORD /d 1 /f
reg add "HKLM\SYSTEM\Setup\LabConfig" /v BypassSecureBootCheck /t REG_DWORD /d 1 /f
reg add "HKLM\SYSTEM\Setup\LabConfig" /v BypassRAMCheck /t REG_DWORD /d 1 /f
reg add "HKLM\SYSTEM\Setup\LabConfig" /v BypassCPUCheck /t REG_DWORD /d 1 /f
reg add "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Terminal Server" /v fDenyTSConnections /t REG_DWORD /d 0 /f
netsh advfirewall firewall set rule group="remote desktop" new enable=Yes
reg add "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Lsa" /v LimitBlankPasswordUse /t REG_DWORD /d 0 /f
reg add "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows NT\Terminal Services" /v AVC444ModePreferred /t REG_DWORD /d 1 /f
RunSynchronousCommand.Description: Prioritize H.264/AVC 444 graphics mode for RDP

RunSynchronousCommand.Path: reg add "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows NT\Terminal Services" /v AVCHardwareEncodePreferred /t REG_DWORD /d 1 /f
RunSynchronousCommand.Description: Enable GPU hardware encoding for RDP

RunSynchronousCommand.Path: reg add "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows NT\Terminal Services" /v ColorDepth /t REG_DWORD /d 5 /f
reg add "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows NT\Terminal Services" /v fEnableWddmDriver /t REG_DWORD /d 1 /f
RunSynchronousCommand.Description: Enable WDDM graphics driver for RDP (improves display pipeline)

RunSynchronousCommand.Path: reg add "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows NT\Terminal Services" /v BitmapCacheEnabled /t REG_DWORD /d 1 /f
RunSynchronousCommand.Description: Enable persistent bitmap cache to reduce bandwidth

RunSynchronousCommand.Path: reg add "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows NT\Terminal Services" /v fAllowToGetHelp /t REG_DWORD /d 0 /f
RunSynchronousCommand.Description: Disable Remote Assistance (reduces attack surface, not needed alongside RDP)

RunSynchronousCommand.Path: reg add "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows NT\Terminal Services" /v MaxCompressionLevel /t REG_DWORD /d 0 /f
RunSynchronousCommand.Description: Disable RDP bulk compression (LAN — bandwidth not a bottleneck)

RunSynchronousCommand.Path: reg add "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Terminal Server\WinStations\RDP-Tcp" /v KeepAliveInterval /t REG_DWORD /d 1 /f
RunSynchronousCommand.Description: Send RDP keep-alive every 1 minute to prevent idle disconnects

RunSynchronousCommand.Path: reg add "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Terminal Server\WinStations\RDP-Tcp" /v MaxInstanceCount /t REG_DWORD /d 4294967295 /f
reg add "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows NT\Terminal Services" /v MaxDisconnectionTime /t REG_DWORD /d 0 /f
reg add "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows NT\Terminal Services" /v MaxIdleTime /t REG_DWORD /d 0 /f
reg add "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Terminal Server" /v fSingleSessionPerUser /t REG_DWORD /d 0 /f
RunSynchronousCommand.Description: Allow multiple simultaneous RDP sessions per user

RunSynchronousCommand.Path: powercfg /hibernate off
reg add "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Session Manager\Memory Management" /v AutomaticManagedPagefile /t REG_DWORD /d 0 /f
reg add "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Session Manager\Memory Management" /v PagingFiles /t REG_MULTI_SZ /d "" /f
RunSynchronousCommand.Description: Clear pagefile entries to disable pagefile
